purpose: Record France Galop and LeTROT acquisition-route checks for PR-130 without promoting unverified or incomplete June 2026 calendar records.

findings: Official France Galop English home page exposes Racing navigation links for Yesterday, Today, Tomorrow, Other dates, Pattern & Listed races, Group 1 races, and Subscribe to the calendar.
The Other dates and Pattern & Listed routes redirected to account sign-in during capture, so they are not usable as no-login PR-130 extraction routes yet.
The calendar subscription page exposes racecourse selection metadata, but did not expose June 2026 meeting_date + racecourse rows in the captured text.
route_checks.do_not_promote_reason: No captured official no-login source provided complete 2026-06 meeting_date + racecourse rows for France Galop.

findings: Official LeTROT home and courses pages expose current-day, tomorrow, and next-days meeting lists with racecourse names in captured text.
The captured routes are rolling short-window pages, not a verified full June 2026 month calendar route.
Do not infer a full June month from current/next-days pages.
route_checks.do_not_promote_reason: No captured official source provided complete 2026-06 meeting_date + racecourse rows for LeTROT.

next_steps: Find a no-login France Galop source or export that exposes 2026-06 meeting_date + racecourse rows.
Find a no-login LeTROT month calendar, API, export, or official programme source that exposes 2026-06 meeting_date + racecourse rows.
Keep France out of manual-june-2026-* until both groups have complete verified month coverage or explicit no-meeting/coverage status.
